business_angle: Macdonald Edinburgh Electrical is the Penicuik-based electrician for homes going solar and electric - solar panels and battery storage, consumer-unit upgrades and induction-hob and EV wiring - fitted clean, tidy and neatly labelled, across Penicuik, Midlothian and south Edinburgh.
why_this_trader_wins: The solar / home-electrification angle is the trader's own, not invented: two independent reviews describe full renewables installs (Liam: 'over the moon with our solar system', the whole consultation-to-commissioning process; Suzanne: 'fitted our solar panels and batteries ... explained what he was doing at every stage'), and a third describes the electrification side (Daniel: 'replaced our main consumer unit, as well as running wiring for additional sockets and induction hob - box and wiring all tidy and neatly labeled'). The completed-work photos back it directly: roof panel arrays, wall-mounted inverters and batteries (Sofar, Anker Solix), and a freshly mounted consumer unit. Combined with 4.9 on Google from 63 reviews and a repeated 'left no dust / tidy / neatly labelled' theme, this is clean-energy electrical work done to a visible standard, not generic 'electrician services'.
target_customer: Penicuik, Midlothian and south-Edinburgh homeowners adding solar panels and battery storage, upgrading a consumer unit / fuse board, or wiring for an induction hob or EV charger, who want the work done tidily and explained as it goes.
page_single_job: Get that homeowner to request a quote (or call) for a solar-and-battery, consumer-unit, EV / induction-hob, or general electrical job.

customer_praise_themes.theme: solar panel and battery installs done end to end

named_people.name: David
named_people.basis: brief.json contact_name='David', contact_name_usage_allowed=true, contact_name_confidence='high', contact_name_evidence_count=5: David is named in 5 of 5 Google reviews as the person doing the work. Used in light third person; no owner-backstory or first-person monologue is invented (no self-description in evidence). This is the ARCH-2 / Kyle Knowles judgment-call basis.

claims_to_avoid: any certification or membership (NICEIC, NAPIT, Part P, MCS, Gas Safe, Checkatrade Vetted, TrustATrader) - none verified; directory_probes show 0 verified profiles (Yell/MyBuilder/Trustpilot are snippet-only, exact-name-single-signal; RatedPeople/MyJobQuote are single-signal unverified; TrustATrader was a homonym; Checkatrade/Bark/Houzz not found). The van in the photos shows an 'NICEIC Approved Contractor' livery but the directory probe did not verify it, so it is NOT claimed in copy.
MCS-certified / government-grant-eligible solar claims - not evidenced

Google Places junk categories as services: brief.json services[] 'Repairs and maintenance', 'Installations', 'Emergency callouts' are broad niche/Places labels, not the evidenced specialisms; do not surface them as the service list
the street address '4 Mauricewood Grove' anywhere public - use Penicuik / EH26 / Midlothian only

claiming Edinburgh city-centre as the base - the base is Penicuik EH26 (LOCATION_MISMATCH_NEEDS_REVIEW: the 'Edinburgh' is in the brand name, the registered base is Penicuik). Frame coverage honestly: based in Penicuik, covering Midlothian and south Edinburgh.
emergency / 24-hour callout as a headline service - 'Emergency callouts' is an unverified Places-style label and no review evidences out-of-hours work; opening hours are Mon-Sat 9-5
a photo count or any invented number as a stat
personality: calm, methodical, clean; an electrician who talks you through the work, fits it tidily and labels it, and is comfortable with modern solar/battery and electrification kit
evidence_strength: moderate-content / single-source (specific, on-angle Google reviews naming solar/battery/consumer-unit work + 10 completed-project photos that match; no verified third-party profile - directories unverified, Facebook none)
pitch_hook_summary: Lead on the clean-energy angle (solar panels + battery storage, consumer-unit upgrades, induction-hob/EV wiring, all fitted tidy and neatly labelled), based in Penicuik covering Midlothian and south Edinburgh, backed by 4.9/63 Google.

metadata.manual_review_note: Single-source (Google-only): no verified third-party profile, contactability=NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW (no email, UK mobile only), and LOCATION_MISMATCH_NEEDS_REVIEW (brand says Edinburgh, base is Penicuik EH26). This is a BUILD run; pitch_gate enforces at outreach time, not build time. The TLS-broken existing site (BROKEN_OR_BAD_SITE, untrusted cert) is a valid rebuild target. Evidence is specific and on-angle (same posture as the Damo / Kyle reference builds).
metadata.authored_blind: Path B authored from the frozen evidence + CLAUDE.md + the webfortrades-site-design skill only. Pre-allocated seed: green-natural family (deep pine/forest, NOT sage [Brian] or eucalyptus [D.G.]), body=Geist, display=slab-serif (Roboto Slab). Distinct from all 9 deployed sites; see design-direction.md distinctness check.
